name: Smoked Tomato Bean Relish with Roasted Root Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beans according to package directions.
2. Place a sauté pan on high heat and add olive oil. Sauté onions until translucent.
3. Add root vegetables (beets, turnips, parsnips, rutabaga, carrots, celery root) and cook until golden brown.
4. Add garlic, smoked plum and yellow tomatoes, cooked beans, and canned tomatoes to the sauté pan. Cook relish until hot.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serving Suggestions:
Quail Medallions
Recipe Compliments of:
Executive Chef Glenn Zamet
Special Events Department
at the Art Institute of Chicago
